gpu: X.Org AMD Radeon HD 7800 Series (PITCAIRN, DRM 3.26.0, 4.18.12-1-MANJARO, LLVM 7.0.0)
title: LEGO The Lord of the Rings

notes: Installing DirectX9 made it work, as hinted in a previous review. Runs perfectly smooth with 60FPS on max settings. Both Keyboard and controller inputs work fine
title: LEGO The Lord of the Rings

notes:
Game works very well after installing Directx9 to proton prefix with winetricks.

If you have game installed in your default game folder:
WINEPREFIX=~/.steam/steam/steamapps/compatdata/214510/pfx/ winetricks directx9

If you have game installed in your custom folder, in my case it was (external HDD etc):
WINEPREFIX=/mnt/c7ec5d19-bc87-46fc-9c72-f82ed1183cff/Steam/steamapps/compatdata/214510/pfx winetricks directx9

For the second case make sure to find the appropriate path to your external steam folder and it should work! Enjoy :D
title: LEGO The Lord of the Rings

notes: WINEPREFIX=~/.steam/steam/steamapps/compatdata/214510/pfx/ winetricks directx9 This makes it work flawlessly.
title: LEGO The Lord of the Rings

notes: Installed directx9 using winetricks as described elsewhere. The only issue I had was a character model rendered invisible in one of the cutscenes. All else has been playable.
title: LEGO The Lord of the Rings

notes: WINEPREFIX=~/.local/share/Steam/steamapps/compatdata/214510/pfx winetricks directx9
title: LEGO The Lord of the Rings

notes: Install DX9 via winetricks.
title: LEGO The Lord of the Rings

notes:
Needed d3dx9 installed with my wine64 setup (the "directx9" param mentioned by others tried to install 32-bit DirectX 9, which failed). I got winetricks via Lutris, but updated it with "winetricks --self-update" and then ran this command (winetricks might be in /usr/share/lutris/bin on your system):

WINEPREFIX=~/.steam/steam/steamapps/compatdata/214510/pfx/ winetricks d3dx9

After that, the game ran perfectly.
title: LEGO The Lord of the Rings

notes: Install DirectX 9 via winetricks WINEPREFIX=~/.steam/steam/steamapps/compatdata/214510/pfx/ winetricks directx9. It runs perfects
title: LEGO The Lord of the Rings

notes: Had to use winetricks to install directx9 and regedit to set the language. The procedure and files for the languages are described there: https://steamcommunity.com/app/214510/discussions/0/864951657986114999/ .

notes: Did as previously said, ran the command in the terminal and after that the game runs good in 4K resolution
